query:
-- 为卡片1插入3张照片
INSERT INTO photos (cardId, url, photoIndex, voteCount, createdAt) VALUES 
(1, 'https://picsum.photos/seed/test1/400/400', 0, 8, NOW()),
(1, 'https://picsum.photos/seed/test2/400/400', 1, 5, NOW()),
(1, 'https://picsum.photos/seed/test3/400/400', 2, 2, NOW());

-- 为卡片2插入4张照片
INSERT INTO photos (cardId, url, photoIndex, voteCount, createdAt) VALUES 
(2, 'https://picsum.photos/seed/test4/400/400', 0, 5, NOW()),
(2, 'https://picsum.photos/seed/test5/400/400', 1, 12, NOW()),
(2, 'https://picsum.photos/seed/test6/400/400', 2, 8, NOW()),
(2, 'https://picsum.photos/seed/test7/400/400', 3, 5, NOW());

-- 为卡片3插入2张照片
INSERT INTO photos (cardId, url, photoIndex, voteCount, createdAt) VALUES 
(3, 'https://picsum.photos/seed/test8/400/400', 0, 3, NOW()),
(3, 'https://picsum.photos/seed/test9/400/400', 1, 5, NOW());
